## FileTree.IFileTreeFileItem.setContents() method

Sets the contents of the file from a JSON value.

**Signature:**

```typescript
setContents(json: JsonValue): Result<JsonValue>;
```

## Parameters

</th><th>

json

[JsonValue](./ts-json-base.jsonvalue.md)


</td><td>

The JSON value to serialize and save.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Result&lt;[JsonValue](./ts-json-base.jsonvalue.md)<!-- -->&gt;

`Success` if the file was saved, or `Failure` with an error message.

## Remarks

This method is optional. If not present, the file is not mutable.
